prompt: A highly detailed, cinematic, surreal illustration of an astronaut in a white spacesuit kneeling to carefully prune a {argument name="plant type" default="bonsai tree"}. The astronaut is situated on a floating fragment of a {argument name="architecture style" default="ruined classical marble temple"} overgrown with ivy and moss, featuring ornate gold trim, classical columns, and a stone statue of a woman. The platform is suspended in zero gravity in outer space. Floating debris, including rocks, chunks of marble, and loose leaves, drift weightlessly around the scene. In the background, a {argument name="background planet" default="large reddish-orange planet"} dominates the starry cosmos. The lighting is dramatic and realistic, highlighting the contrast between the ancient ruins, delicate nature, and the futuristic astronaut.

breakdown.creativeCore: Astronaut Tending Bonsai in Space Ruins：Generates a surreal sci-fi scene of an astronaut interacting with nature on a floating architectural ruin in space.
breakdown.subject: 人物
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 电影海报、音乐封面、书籍封面、播客封面

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, cinematic, sci-fi]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
[是否含文字/精确文字/可读性要求]。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
